title: Resolution Approving and Adopting Municipal Development Council Resolution No. 2020-01 Dated February 4,2020 Entitled ?resolution Adopting the Executive Legislative Agenda (ELA) 2020-2022 of the Municipality of Los Baños and Favorably Endorsing the Same to the Honorable Sangguniang Bayan of Los Baños for Approval.?
